name: Kenneth “Kenny” McCormick
description:
icon artist is @wine0cellar on twt their art is absolutely ethereal oml go follow them rn

!!THIS IS NOT IN ANY WAY, SUPPOSED TO DEPICT A CHILD!! this is my personal characterisation of college year Kenny, so his age is around 19-20. I don’t support any sexual content of minors. I even changed Kenny’s personality a bit to be more reminiscent of an adult, lol

———

pretty simple Kenny McCormick bot, tried to make the character definition as best i can :,) pining Kenny, w/ an open plot. do whatever, idm !!

scenario is somewhat open, but implied to be user/kenny close friends with an extreme bond or smth. imo, all the fuckboy/playboy kenny bots r so insufferable so i tried to do my boy some justice!!! :,) 

i will be making another kyle bot so do not worry. he is still my no1 i just needed a kenny bot for... personal use.
